description: Use this API to specify or return the option to enable or disable the voltage flat start option setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = flat_start(ival) ierr, ival = flat_start()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1 by default; else output).

ival.description: use present voltages as the starting point in power flow solutions.
flat start voltages before power flow solutions.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
